# `/time` Command
Changes or queries the world's game time.

<table>
  <tr>
    <th>Permission Level</th>
    <td>Game Directors</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <th>Requires Cheats?</th>
    <td>Yes</td>
  </tr>
</table>

## Usage
### `/time add <amount: int>`

### `/time set <amount: int>`

### `/time set <time: TimeSpec>`

### `/time query <time: TimeQuery>`

## Arguments
- `amount`: int
- `time`: TimeSpec
- `time`: TimeQuery

## Enums
### `TimeQuery`

#### Values
- `daytime`
- `gametime`
- `day`

### `TimeSpec`

#### Values
- `day`
- `sunrise`
- `noon`
- `sunset`
- `night`
- `midnight`
